import pyodbc
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

server = os.getenv\(''ODYSSEE_SERVER'', ''kasoft.selfip.net''\)
database = os.getenv\(''ODYSSEE_DATABASE'', ''GROUPE_ALBOUGHAZE''\)
user = os.getenv\(''ODYSSEE_USER'', ''sa''\)
password = os.getenv\(''ODYSSEE_PASSWORD'', ''SQL@2019''\)

print\(f''Connexion a {server}/{database}...''\)

conn_str = \(
    f''DRIVER={{ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server}};''
    f''SERVER={server};''
    f''DATABASE={database};''
    f''UID={user};''
    f''PWD={password};''
    f''TrustServerCertificate=yes;''
    f''Connection Timeout=30''
\)

try:
    conn = pyodbc.connect\(conn_str\)
    cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
    cursor.execute\(''SELECT 1 as test''\)
    print\(''Connexion OK!''\)
    conn.close\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Erreur: {e}''\)
")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Reporting Commercial - GROUPE ALBOUGHAZE

Application complete de reporting commercial avec:
- Backend FastAPI + SQL Server \(pyodbc\)
- Frontend React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Recharts
- Dashboard Builder avec 16 types de widgets \(KPI, Gauge, Progress,
  Sparkline, Bar, Stacked Bar, Combo, Line, Area, Pie, Funnel, Treemap,
  Table, Text, Image\), filtres globaux, agregation avancee \(SUM/AVG/MIN/
  MAX/COUNT\), mise en forme conditionnelle, auto-refresh, 3 series
- Pivot Builder V2 avec date grouping, drill-down, export Excel/PDF
- GridView Builder avec colonnes configurables
- DataSource Templates unifies \(template + override par societe\)
- Gestion multi-tenant \(DWH par societe\)
- ETL agents pour synchronisation
- Menu dynamique avec gestion d''acces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

import pyodbc, json
conn = pyodbc.connect\(''DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=kasoft.selfip.net;DATABASE=OptiBoard_SaaS;UID=sa;PWD=SQL@2019'', autocommit=True\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\(""SELECT id, nom, data_source_code, show_totals, total_columns FROM APP_GridViews WHERE data_source_code LIKE ''DS_VTE_%'' OR data_source_code LIKE ''DS_ACH_%'' ORDER BY data_source_code""\)
for row in cur.fetchall\(\):
    tc = row[4] if row[4] else ''[]''
    print\(f''ID={row[0]:3d} | {row[2]:30s} | show_totals={row[3]} | total_columns={tc}''\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import pyodbc, json
conn = pyodbc.connect\(''DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=kasoft.selfip.net;DATABASE=OptiBoard_SaaS;UID=sa;PWD=SQL@2019'', autocommit=True\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)

# Définir les total_columns pour chaque document
updates = {
    # VENTES
    ''DS_VTE_FACTURES'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_BL'': [''Quantité BL'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_BC'': [''Quantité BC'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_DEVIS'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_AVOIRS'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_RETOURS'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_VTE_PL'': [''Quantité PL'', ''Montant HT''],
    ''DS_VTE_CMD_EN_COURS'': [''Qté Commandée'', ''Qté Livrée'', ''Qté Restante'', ''Montant HT''],
    # ACHATS
    ''DS_ACH_FACTURES'': [''Quantité'', ''Prix Unitaire'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_ACH_BL'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_ACH_BC'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_ACH_DA'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT''],
    ''DS_ACH_AVOIRS'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_ACH_RETOURS'': [''Quantité'', ''Montant HT'', ''Montant TTC''],
    ''DS_ACH_COMMANDES_EN_COURS'': [''Qté Commandée'', ''Qté Reçue'', ''Qté Restante'', ''Montant HT''],
}

updated = 0
for code, tc in updates.items\(\):
    cur.execute\(''UPDATE APP_GridViews SET total_columns = ?, show_totals = 1 WHERE data_source_code = ?'',
                \(json.dumps\(tc, ensure_ascii=False\), code\)\)
    if cur.rowcount > 0:
        updated += 1
        print\(f''  [OK] {code}: {tc}''\)
    else:
        print\(f''  [SKIP] {code} non trouvé''\)

print\(f''\\n==> {updated} gridviews mis à jour avec total_columns''\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd ''D:\\FinAnnee\\reporting-commercial''; python -c ""
import pyodbc
conn = pyodbc.connect\(''DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=kasoft.selfip.net;DATABASE=OptiBoard_SaaS;UID=sa;PWD=SQL@2019;TrustServerCertificate=yes''\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

# Get the stored query
cursor.execute\(''SELECT query_template FROM APP_DataSources_Templates WHERE code = ?'', ''DS_REC_ECHEANCES_DETAIL''\)
row = cursor.fetchone\(\)
query = row[0]

# Simulate inject_params
query = query.replace\(''@dateDebut'', chr\(39\) + ''20250101'' + chr\(39\)\)
query = query.replace\(''@dateFin'', chr\(39\) + ''20251231'' + chr\(39\)\)
query = query.replace\(''@societe'', ''NULL''\)

# Try to execute on a DWH database
# First find DWH databases
cursor.execute\(''SELECT code, nom, connection_string FROM APP_DWH WHERE actif = 1''\)
dwhs = cursor.fetchall\(\)
for d in dwhs:
    print\(f''DWH: {d[0]} - {d[1]}''\)
    print\(f''  ConnStr: {d[2][:100]}...''\)
conn.close\(\)

# Now try on first DWH
if dwhs:
    dwh_conn_str = dwhs[0][2]
    print\(f''\\nTesting on DWH: {dwhs[0][0]}''\)
    try:
        dwh_conn = pyodbc.connect\(dwh_conn_str\)
        dwh_cursor = dwh_conn.cursor\(\)
        
        # First check table exists
        dwh_cursor.execute\(''SELECT TOP 1 * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE  N'' + chr\(39\) + ''%ch%ances_Ventes'' + chr\(39\)\)
        tables = dwh_cursor.fetchall\(\)
        for t in tables:
            print\(f''  Found table: {t[2]}''\)
        
        # Check columns
        dwh_cursor.execute\(''SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE N'' + chr\(39\) + ''%ch%ances_Ventes'' + chr\(39\) + '' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION''\)
        cols = dwh_cursor.fetchall\(\)
        print\(f''\\n  Columns in Echeances_Ventes \({len\(cols\)}\):''\)
        for c in cols:
            print\(f''    - {c[0]}''\)
        
        dwh_conn.close\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''Error: {e}''\)
""")

Bash(python -c "
import pyodbc
conn = pyodbc.connect\(''DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=kasoft.selfip.net;DATABASE=OptiBoard_SaaS;UID=sa;PWD=SQL@2019;TrustServerCertificate=yes''\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

# Get all recouvrement datasource templates
cursor.execute\(""SELECT id, code, nom FROM APP_DataSource_Templates WHERE category = ''recouvrement'' ORDER BY id""\)
templates = cursor.fetchall\(\)
print\(''=== DATASOURCE TEMPLATES ===''\)
for t in templates:
    print\(f''  id={t[0]} | {t[1]} | {t[2]}''\)

print\(\)

# Get all recouvrement gridviews
cursor.execute\(""SELECT id, nom, data_source_code FROM APP_GridViews WHERE data_source_code LIKE ''DS_REC_%'' ORDER BY id""\)
grids = cursor.fetchall\(\)
print\(''=== GRIDVIEWS ===''\)
for g in grids:
    print\(f''  id={g[0]} | {g[2]} | {g[1]}''\)

print\(\)

# Get all recouvrement pivots
cursor.execute\(""SELECT id, nom, data_source_code FROM APP_Pivots_V2 WHERE data_source_code LIKE ''DS_REC_%'' ORDER BY id""\)
pivots = cursor.fetchall\(\)
print\(''=== PIVOTS V2 ===''\)
for p in pivots:
    print\(f''  id={p[0]} | {p[2]} | {p[1]}''\)

print\(\)

# Get all recouvrement dashboards
cursor.execute\(""SELECT id, nom FROM APP_Dashboards WHERE nom LIKE ''%ecouvrement%'' OR nom LIKE ''%TB Recouvrement%'' OR nom LIKE ''%Balance%'' OR nom LIKE ''%Debiteur%'' OR nom LIKE ''%Encaiss%'' OR nom LIKE ''%Risque%'' OR nom LIKE ''%Synth%Annuelle%'' ORDER BY id""\)
dbs = cursor.fetchall\(\)
print\(''=== DASHBOARDS ===''\)
for d in dbs:
    print\(f''  id={d[0]} | {d[1]}''\)

print\(\)

# Get menus
cursor.execute\(""SELECT id FROM APP_Menus WHERE nom = ''Recouvrement'' AND parent_id IS NULL""\)
root = cursor.fetchone\(\)
if root:
    root_id = root[0]
    cursor.execute\(''SELECT id, nom FROM APP_Menus WHERE parent_id = ?'', root_id\)
    sfs = cursor.fetchall\(\)
    print\(''=== MENUS ===''\)
    for sf in sfs:
        print\(f''  [{sf[1]}]''\)
        cursor.execute\(''SELECT nom, type, target_id FROM APP_Menus WHERE parent_id = ? ORDER BY ordre'', sf[0]\)
        for m in cursor.fetchall\(\):
            print\(f''    {m[0]} | {m[1]} -> target_id={m[2]}''\)

conn.close\(\)
")

")
